comments: Both mofaflex and mudata are required to be packaged manually since they are not available in nixpkgs.
The flake.nix uses nixos-unstable channel to access latest Python packages and uses flake-utils for multi-platform support.
The flake imports derivations from ./main and ./dep1 but wraps them with the package set provided by nixpkgs python environment that already contains mudata and other dependencies.
The fetchPypi hashes (sha256-...) are placeholders; real hashes should be computed using nix-prefetch or by building once and checking output hash.
Since mofaflex requires Python >=3.11 and mudata >=3.10, the default Python 3 version from nixpkgs nixos-unstable (currently 3.12) satisfies both.
The flake uses buildPythonPackage with pyproject = true implicitly by default in modern nixpkgs, but the pyproject flag was omitted since the package metadata indicates pyproject.toml usage.
Tests are disabled (doCheck = false) per instructions; in practice, tests for mofaflex would require large fixtures and are non-trivial to set up.
The mudata dependency in mofaflex means mudata must be present before mofaflex in the environment, which is ensured by ordering in the flake's pythonWithPackages.
The flake exposes both packages separately (mofaflex, mudata) and sets mofaflex as the default package.
